As a premium user I like Spotify, but I have a few gripes. #1: It's frequently very slow to load. #2: Saving a song to multiple playlists at once doesn't work consistently (especially with long playlists). #3: Whenever I'm about to click something on the home page, the page suddenly reloads and moves everything around, so I click the wrong thing. #4: I wish I could set a specific playlist to skip explicit songs for my kid, instead of having to set that for my whole account every time.

Recently Spotify made a change so that podcast episodes always play in chronological order, rather than how the episodes are sorted. This makes it incredibly difficult to work through backlog episodes of a show. And it makes NO sense to actively remove a users' playback options and force an autoplay order that is unintuitive. Edit: in response to Spotify's comment to this review, I have already tried reinstalling, and your support team confirmed that this behavior is a feature, not an error.
